lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, used to validate the multirole loadout, cargo capacity and engineered jump range.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Imperial Clipper ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Hardpoint sizes, optional & core slot layout and engineering blueprint data behind the spec grid and loadout table.

sources.label: Inara — Imperial Clipper
sources.what: Ship reference page cross-checked for hull stats, module slot layout and the Imperial Baron rank requirement.

sources.label: Fandom wiki
sources.what: Imperial Clipper article: role profile, Gutamaya manufacture and rank gate backing the multipurpose write-up.
